title: Commander Night
shortDescription: Free Commander Night every Tuesday. Pods start every 30 minutes. All power levels welcome.
description: Join us every Tuesday for Commander Night at Kitsune Brewing Co.! We organize players into pods of 4 and let the chaos unfold. Casual and competitive pods available — just let us know your preferred power level. New players are always welcome. Free entry, no registration required. Grab a brew and sling some spells!
location: Kitsune Brewing Co. — 3321 E Bell Rd Suite B-5, Phoenix, AZ 85032
prizeSupport: Free entry. Prizes and giveaways throughout the night.

faq.question: Is there an entry fee?
faq.answer: No entry fee — Commander Night is completely free!

faq.question: Do I need to register?
faq.answer: No registration required. Just show up between 5:30 PM and 9:00 PM and we'll get you into a pod.

faq.question: What power level should my deck be?
faq.answer: We welcome all power levels from casual to cEDH. Let us know your preference and we'll match you to the right pod.

faq.question: Are minors allowed?
faq.answer: Players of all ages are welcome. Minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. Alcohol service follows Arizona state law.

faq.question: Where do I park?
faq.answer: Free parking is available in the shopping center lot directly in front of the brewery.

title: Hobbit Prerelease
shortDescription: Be the first to play The Hobbit! Sealed prerelease packs, prizes, and more.
description: Don't miss the Hobbit Prerelease at Kitsune Brewing Co.! Be among the first players in Phoenix to crack open Hobbit packs before the official release. Each player receives a Prerelease Kit, builds a 40-card sealed deck, and competes in 4 rounds of Swiss. Keep everything you open, earn prizes based on your record, and celebrate the launch of one of Magic's most exciting new sets!
location: Kitsune Brewing Co. — 3321 E Bell Rd Suite B-5, Phoenix, AZ 85032
prizeSupport: Stamped promo card for all participants. Bonus packs for top finishers.

faq.question: What is included in the Prerelease Kit?
faq.answer: Each kit includes Hobbit booster packs, a stamped foil promo rare, and a deckbuilding guide.

faq.question: How long does it run?
faq.answer: Approximately 4 hours. Doors open at 2:00 PM and play typically wraps up around 6:00 PM.

faq.question: Do I need to register in advance?
faq.answer: Yes — we recommend registering ahead of time to secure your spot as space is limited.

faq.question: Are minors allowed?
faq.answer: Players of all ages are welcome. Minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. Alcohol service follows Arizona state law.

faq.question: Where do I park?
faq.answer: Free parking is available in the shopping center lot directly in front of the brewery.
